testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Page Structure loads views page
OpenSparrow – Views: Page Structure view container exists
OpenSparrow – Views: Page Structure shows loading state initially
OpenSparrow – Views: Page Structure shows global search input
OpenSparrow – Views: Page Structure shows sidebar menu
OpenSparrow – Views: Selector Loading view container transitions out of loading state
testcase.classname: view container transitions out of loading state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Selector Loading shows selector cards, empty message, or error after load
testcase.classname: shows selector cards, empty message, or error after load

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Selector Loading if views configured: selector cards render
testcase.classname: if views configured: selector cards render

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Selector Loading if views configured: each card has a title (h3)
testcase.classname: if views configured: each card has a title (h3)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Selector Loading if no views: shows empty state message
testcase.classname: if no views: shows empty state message

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Open View clicking a view card opens view with header
testcase.classname: clicking a view card opens view with header

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Open View view header shows title
OpenSparrow – Views: Open View opened view shows data table or empty state
testcase.classname: opened view shows data table or empty state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: Open View opened view has back (drill-up) button
OpenSparrow – Views: Open View back button returns to selector
OpenSparrow – Views: Open View view table has sortable column headers
testcase.classname: view table has sortable column headers

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Views: URL param views.php with ?view= param auto-opens view if valid
testcase.classname: views.php with ?view= param auto-opens view if valid
